title: Please, thank you, sorry
objectives: Be polite when asking for something
Thank people and respond to thanks

vocab.hint: use when YOU did something wrong

grammar_notes: perdón = getting attention or a light 'sorry'. lo siento = a heartfelt apology. Don't mix them up.
example_phrases: — Un café, por favor. — Aquí tienes. — Gracias. — De nada.
— Lo siento, no entiendo. — No pasa nada.
